engines.reason: cosyvoice package not installed. Install from https://github.com/FunAudioLLM/CosyVoice (git clone --recursive + pip install -r requirements.txt + SoX). Then set OMNIVOICE_COSYVOICE_MODEL to your model directory.

engines.display_name: VoxCPM2 (30 langs, studio 48 kHz, voice design)
engines.reason: voxcpm package not installed. Install with `pip install voxcpm` (requires Python ≥3.10, PyTorch ≥2.5). CUDA ≥12 recommended for full speed; MPS (Apple Silicon) and CPU also supported.
engines.install_hint: pip install voxcpm     (CPU/MPS supported; CUDA recommended for speed)
engines.last_error: voxcpm package not installed. Install with `pip install voxcpm` (requires Python ≥3.10, PyTorch ≥2.5). CUDA ≥12 recommended for full speed; MPS (Apple Silicon) and CPU also supported.

engines.reason: IndexTTS-2 venv not found. Set OMNIVOICE_INDEXTTS_DIR to your IndexTTS clone (the directory containing checkpoints/) and restart OmniVoice. See docs/engines/indextts.md for the full install walk-through.
engines.install_hint: git clone index-tts/index-tts && uv pip install -e .  (NOT uv sync --all-extras)

engines.install_hint: Bundled — runs the C++ omnivoice-tts binary in bin/. Quants download lazily from Serveurperso/OmniVoice-GGUF on first generate.

engines.display_name: Supertonic-3 (31 langs, CPU ONNX, 7 preset voices, OpenRAIL-M)
engines.reason: supertonic package not installed. Enable in Settings → Engines (installs `supertonic` via `uv add --optional supertonic supertonic==1.3.1`).
engines.install_hint: uv sync --extra supertonic  (CPU-only ONNX, 31 langs, ~400 MB model on first use; OpenRAIL-M model license)
engines.last_error: supertonic package not installed. Enable in Settings → Engines (installs `supertonic` via `uv add --optional supertonic supertonic==1.3.1`).

engines.display_name: MOSS-TTS-v1.5 (8B, 31 langs, zero-shot clone, CUDA/CPU, Apache-2.0)
engines.reason: MOSS-TTS-v1.5 venv not found. Set OMNIVOICE_MOSS_TTS_V15_DIR to your MOSS-TTS clone (the directory containing pyproject.toml) and restart OmniVoice. CUDA or CPU only (no MPS). See docs/engines/moss-tts-v15.md for the full install walk-through.
engines.install_hint: git clone OpenMOSS/MOSS-TTS + set OMNIVOICE_MOSS_TTS_V15_DIR  (own venv, transformers==5.0; 8B, ~16 GB weights; CUDA/CPU, no MPS; Apache-2.0)
engines.last_error: MOSS-TTS-v1.5 venv not found. Set OMNIVOICE_MOSS_TTS_V15_DIR to your MOSS-TTS clone (the directory containing pyproject.toml) and restart OmniVoice. CUDA or CPU only (no MPS). See docs/engines/moss-tts-v15.md for the full install walk-through.

engines.display_name: dots.tts (2B, 24 langs, zero-shot clone, CUDA/CPU, 48 kHz, Apache-2.0)
engines.reason: dots.tts is not supported on Windows — upstream targets Linux and macOS only. Run OmniVoice under WSL2, or use a Linux/macOS host. See docs/engines/dots-tts.md.
engines.install_hint: git clone rednote-hilab/dots.tts + set OMNIVOICE_DOTS_TTS_DIR  (own venv, transformers==4.57; 2B, ~9 GB weights; CUDA/CPU, Linux/macOS only — no Windows; Apache-2.0)
engines.last_error: dots.tts is not supported on Windows — upstream targets Linux and macOS only. Run OmniVoice under WSL2, or use a Linux/macOS host. See docs/engines/dots-tts.md.
